decomposeRationale: Approved office-hours design (rasen/office-hours/frontend-ui-redesign.md, 9/10 after 3 adversarial review rounds) defines 3 independently-reviewable slices with an explicit dependency chain: design-system tokens (pure restyle, zero behavior) -> journey/IA restructure (depends on tokens) -> exit-1 HF publish wiring (daemon+UI, depends on journey shell for the exit-card slot). Combined diff would span design system + IA rewrite + new daemon routes — too large to review as one.

userDecisions.scope: office-hours scope C: visual system + journey restructure + HF publish wiring (2026-07-09)
userDecisions.gates: user pre-authorized continuous run — gates reported, not blocked on ('no gate，你来推进执行所有任务', 2026-07-09)
userDecisions.designAuthority: rasen/office-hours/frontend-ui-redesign.md is AUTHORITATIVE for all three slices

notes: Strict serial chain — all three slices touch packages/ui, no positive independence proof. CLI is rasen fork; root migrated openspec/ -> rasen/ this run (copy-only, openspec/ frozen read-only legacy). Workers must use node <rasen.js path> for CLI and write artifacts under rasen/changes/. Do NOT modify archived v01/v02 artifacts.
